name: Peach Vomit
author: CherryTeam

placementContext.reason: Peach Vomit is a visually striking project from the CherryTeam, combining a unique soft aesthetic with high-speed mechanical challenge that targets the upper end of the demon list.

description: A high-detail 4k project featuring a distinct aesthetic and demanding mechanical segments, Peach Vomit is a standout project that pushes the limits of technical creative design.
